title: Fable 5停用，Opus 4.8与GPT-5.5仍领先
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
elvis
@omarsar0
No need to panic. IMO, Fable 5 wasn’t worth it for most tasks, not to mention costs and the nerfing.
Opus 4.8 (planning) and GPT-5.5 (execution) still takes the crown.
ClaudeDevs
@ClaudeDevs
4h
As a result of a US government directive, we are suspending access to Claude Fable 5 for all users. You can continue to use all other Claude models.
Here’s what this means for you:
Across Claude products, new sessions will run on your selected default model or Opus 4.8, and Show more
3:04 AM · Jun 13, 2026 6.9K Views

visible_range: 抓取时页面可见正文 / 讨论文本

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 因美国政府指令，Anthropic暂停所有用户对Claude Fable 5的访问。新产品会话将运行默认模型或Opus 4.8，已有Fable 5会话报错，平台请求也返回错误。DAIR.AI的Elvis Saravia评论称不必恐慌，认为Fable 5对大多数任务不值，且成本高、性能被削弱；规划任务用Opus 4.8、执行任务用GPT-5.5仍是当前最佳组合。

key_excerpts.text: 因美国政府指令，Anthropic暂停所有用户对Claude Fable 5的访问。新产品会话将运行默认模型或Opus 4.8，已有Fable 5会话报错，平台请求也返回错误。DAIR.AI的Elvis Saravia评论称不必恐慌，认为Fable 5对大多数任务不值，且成本高、性能被削弱；规划任务用Opus 4.8、执行任务用GPT-5.5仍是当前最佳组合。
Post Log in Sign up Post elvis @omarsar0 No need to panic.
IMO, Fable 5 wasn’t worth it for most tasks, not to mention costs and the nerfing.
